contradictions.text: And once you see the conditions, the apparent contradiction dissolves completely. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Stage 1: Human Anchor Picture a hospital before antibiotics existed.
Without penicillin — which hasn't been invented yet — there is exactly one intervention that stops the infection from reaching the bloodstream and killing the patient: amputation.
But the modern doctor has penicillin.
The church declared him a heretic but never fully answered the structural question underneath his claim.
It rested on David after his anointing — and when David sinned, his terror was not "please forgive me" but "do not take your Holy Spirit from me" (Psalm 51:11).
The immune function had not yet been installed.

Ephesians 6:12: "We wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world." That's not the same adversary doing the same thing.
God doing triage — external catastrophic intervention — because the internal repair mechanism doesn't exist yet.

Because what the operating conditions permitted changed. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Stage 5: Truth Bomb The God of the flood and the God of the Sermon on the Mount are not in tension.

axiom_items.text: And the specific thing that changed — the mechanism that changed everything — is the Holy Spirit. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Stage 2: Principle Revealed In the Master Equation, every human being has a coupling constant to the coherence field: The variable — Coherence/Consciousness — isn't binary.

The falsification criterion is measurable: if this framework is correct, post-Pentecost adversarial strategy should be systematically institutional — working through structures, not direct personal encounter.
